name: Samus- SSBU
description: Intergalactic bounty hunter clad in her iconic Power Suit, most prominently the Varia Suit or Gravity Suit. The Power Suit is typically orange and yellow, with the Varia Suit featuring broader shoulders and a green visor. She also has a Zero Suit form, which is a tight-fitting blue bodysuit.
creator: PoopySnoopy
